member.name: T:DepenMock.NSubstitute.NSubstituteExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for working with NSubstitute-backed instances.

member.name: M:DepenMock.NSubstitute.NSubstituteExtensions.AsNSubstitute``1(DepenMock.Mocks.IMock{``0})
member.summary: Unwraps the underlying NSubstitute substitute from an , giving access to NSubstitute's Returns and Received APIs.

member.name: T:DepenMock.NSubstitute.NSubstituteMock`1
member.summary: An implementation backed by an NSubstitute substitute. Access the underlying property (or call ) to use NSubstitute's Returns and Received APIs.
member.typeparam: The type being mocked. Must be a reference type.

member.name: M:DepenMock.NSubstitute.NSubstituteMock`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of wrapping the given substitute.

member.name: P:DepenMock.NSubstitute.NSubstituteMock`1.Substitute
member.summary: Gets the underlying NSubstitute instance, providing access to Returns, Received, and all other NSubstitute-specific APIs.

member.name: T:DepenMock.NSubstitute.NSubstituteMockFactory
member.summary: An implementation that uses NSubstitute and AutoFixture.AutoNSubstitute to automatically create and register substitutes for unregistered dependencies.

member.name: M:DepenMock.NSubstitute.NSubstituteMockFactory.GetCustomization
member.remarks: Returns an with ConfigureMembers = true, which instructs AutoFixture to automatically stub all members of auto-created substitutes.

member.name: M:DepenMock.NSubstitute.NSubstituteMockFactory.GetMock``1(AutoFixture.IFixture)
member.remarks: Freezes in the fixture so the same substitute instance is reused whenever is resolved, then wraps it in a .
